title: data collection for [FLAT_]UNAGI with splitting procedure
author: Mak, Julian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Edit in newest version, 15 Oct 2023:   ( important ) there is a bug NEMO GEOMETRIC code (advection of parameterised eddy energy; see ldfeke.F90), fixed in the present version  processed data for UNAGI using GEOMETRIC updated  FLAT_UNAGI data  not  updated, as the presence of advection seems to make very little difference in the sample calculations (likely because that model is uniform in the zonal direction, unlike in UNAGI where a ridge is present)  ver. 2 contains a streamlined version of the data; see ver. 1 for samples of other data not included in the article itself (e.g. FLAT_UNAGI)   =================  Data for "Energetic scale-awareness in an eddy energy constrained mesoscale eddy parameterization". Contains   NEMO modification files for "splitting" procedure algorithm  input and config files for the idealised configuration ("UNAGI" and "FLAT_UNAGI")  sample data to reproduce plots in the paper  some supplementary data from "UNAGI" and "FLAT_UNAGI"   Files collected in different zip files to avoid the need to download the whole pack in one go (e.g. if only the "splitting" algorithm source files are desired). See readme for data/folder structure.
steps_raw: Edit in newest version, 15 Oct 2023:   ( important ) there is a bug NEMO GEOMETRIC code (advection of parameterised eddy energy; see ldfeke.F90), fixed in the present version  processed data for UNAGI using GEOMETRIC updated  FLAT_UNAGI data  not  updated, as the presence of advection seems to make very little difference in the sample calculations (likely because that model is uniform in the zonal direction, unlike in UNAGI where a ridge is present)  ver. 2 contains a streamlined version of the data; see ver. 1 for samples of other data not included in the article itself (e.g. FLAT_UNAGI)   =================  Data for "Energetic scale-awareness in an eddy energy constrained mesoscale eddy parameterization". Contains   NEMO modification files for "splitting" procedure algorithm  input and config files for the idealised configuration ("UNAGI" and "FLAT_UNAGI")  sample data to reproduce plots in the paper  some supplementary data from "UNAGI" and "FLAT_UNAGI"   Files collected in different zip files to avoid the need to download the whole pack in one go (e.g. if only the "splitting" algorithm source files are desired). See readme for data/folder structure.
